entity.label: Kedesh

entity.description: A city of Issachar (1 Chr. 6:72). Possibly Tell Abu Kadeis, near Lejjun.

nodes.description: A city of Issachar (1 Chr. 6:72). Possibly Tell Abu Kadeis, near Lejjun.

verses.text: And out of the tribe of Issachar; Kedesh with her suburbs, Daberath with her suburbs,
